title: blob: VAPID key extraction from session capability
description:
Extract VAPID public key from session capabilities for push service registration:
- Capability: urn:ietf:params:jmap:webpush-vapid
- Session.capabilities[...].vapidPublicKey: String (base64url-encoded P-256 public key)
- Expose as JmapSession::vapid_public_key() -> Option<&str>
- Pass to browser/platform push service when registering PushSubscription endpoint
- Test: parse fixture session JSON with webpush-vapid capability, assert key extracted correctly

Fixture file: tests/fixtures/session_with_vapid.json
close_reason: Implementation and tests already present from prior work
